events.title: Next Steps Class | Sycamore
events.summary:
Next Steps is a gathering designed to accelerate us into full engagement with Jesus and His purpose for our life. If you're new to Radiant, your spiritual growth has plateaued or you just need a little help finding what your next step is, this group is for you. 

It is important you are able to attend both sessions, if you have a conflict please select another session.

Radiant Kids is available during each of our Sunday services.

events.title: RISE UP | A Women's Event
events.summary:
Join us on April 24th at 6:30 PM for our very first women’s event—RISE UP!

This special evening is all about stepping boldly into your God-given calling as a woman of faith. Through powerful worship, encouraging messages, and meaningful fellowship,  you’ll gather together to be strengthened, uplifted, and inspired to RISE UP. Enjoy this evening with charcuterie and a make-your-own bouquet bar—designed for you to relax, connect, and be refreshed.

We hope to see you there!

Please note: Radiant Kids will not be available for this event! We kindly ask that children are left at home, so ladies can enjoy being fully present.

events.title: Refresh | Awaken & Bloom Alumni
events.summary: Bloom & Awaken Alumni, this one’s for you! Join us for a day of engaging with the Lord’s voice in nature out at the Radiant Retreat Center. This day is designed for you to rediscover the resources & tools from your event, to maintain your freedom. Pack a lunch, bring a lawn chair, and join us on Saturday, May 2nd from 9-5pm. Registration is required. We hope to see you there.

events.title: Water Baptisms
events.summary:
If you are a new believer or have never been baptized, we encourage you to sign up today and take the next step in your walk with God and be a part of Water Baptisms on May 3rd at both of our campuses. Water Baptism is one of the ways we identify ourselves with Christ. It’s an outward expression of what God has done in us.

The deadline to sign up for baptisms is April 28th.

events.title: Child Dedications
events.summary:
At Radiant, we encourage Christian parents to dedicate their children to the Lord. This is a ceremony where parents formally call upon God’s blessing for their child and publicly commit to raising them in accordance with Scripture. Child Dedications will be held on Mother's Day Sunday, May 10th during each service. 

Registration in advance is required. The deadline to sign-up is May 5th.

events.title: Mother's Day at Radiant Jackson
events.summary:
Happy Mother’s Day!

We honor every woman God has entrusted with the sacred work of nurturing lives—seen and unseen. In every season of motherhood, your prayers, love, and obedience matter deeply to the Kingdom.

Thank you Moms <3

events.title: Bloom
events.summary: Bloom is a four-day event for women, focused on seeking the Father’s heart without distraction. This intentional time will allow you to listen, and receive the powerful truths God speaks over you. You will leave with a renewed identity as a beloved daughter of our Heavenly Father. When we agree with God and walk in our identity we will begin to walk and lead in freedom. The event cost is $400

events.title: Rekindle Your Marriage | Vision Retreat
events.summary:
We are excited to share with you a marriage retreat held by Ruins Rebuilt Ministry, called "Rekindle Your Marriage Vision Retreat"!

Rekindle Your Marriage Vision Retreat is designed to allow you and your spouse to get away and focus on one another. We often get busy with life events; work, school, kids, parents, ourselves, house projects, etc. Although these things are all important, many of us unintentionally put our marriages on the back burners, and before we realize it, the flames have died out and the coals are cold.

This retreat sets the table for couples to re-establish intentionality, their proximity to each other, to grow & strengthen their marriage and stay united with Christ. Couples will have 2 nights at the Candlelite Inn Bed & Breakfast in Ludington, MI. The cost is $300 per couple. A non-refundable deposit of $100 will hold your spot. Limited space is available.

For more information or to register for this event, please contact Ruins Rebuilt Ministries at ruinsrebuilt4him@gmail.com.

events.title: School of the Spirit
events.summary:
School of the Spirit is an in-depth course designed to equip and train you to walk in the presence and gifts of the Holy Spirit. You will be taught how to operate in the gifts of the Holy Spirit at a deeper level and understand how you can build a strong biblical foundation for living a Spirit-led life.

School of the Spirit will take place May 16th, at the Sycamore Campus from 9AM to 4PM. The cost for this event is $30/person to cover food and materials.

Anyone can attend, Radiant Kids will not be available.

events.title: Next Steps Class | Spring Arbor
events.summary:
Next Steps is a gathering designed to accelerate us into full engagement with Jesus and His purpose for our life. If you're new to Radiant, your spiritual growth has plateaued or you just need a little help finding what your next step is, this group is for you. 

It is important you are able to attend both sessions, if you have a conflict please select another session.

Radiant Kids is available during each of our Sunday services.

events.title: Awaken
events.summary:
Awaken is a four-day journey beginning a walk of seeking the Father’s heart without distraction. These days provide the time needed for searching and listening to what the Father says is true about us. You will leave with a new identity as a son of our Heavenly Father. When we agree with God and walk into our identity we will begin to walk and lead in freedom.

The cost of the event is $400. Space is limited, so sign up today!

events.title: New to Radiant
events.summary:
If you’re new to Radiant or interested in learning more about us, we invite you to join us at New to Radiant! This relaxed gathering will give you an opportunity to hear our story and vision, ask questions, and meet some of our leaders. 

We’d love to see you at 6PM on May 31st at the Sycamore Campus!

events.title: Bloom
events.summary: Bloom is a four-day event for women, focused on seeking the Father’s heart without distraction. This intentional time will allow you to listen, and receive the powerful truths God speaks over you. You will leave with a renewed identity as a beloved daughter of our Heavenly Father. When we agree with God and walk in our identity we will begin to walk and lead in freedom. The event cost is $400

events.title: Water Baptisms
events.summary:
If you are a new believer or have never been baptized, we encourage you to sign up today and take the next step in your walk with God and be a part of Water Baptisms on June 28th at both of our campuses. Water Baptism is one of the ways we identify ourselves with Christ. It’s an outward expression of what God has done in us.

The deadline to sign up for baptisms is June 23rd.

events.title: Awaken
events.summary:
Awaken is a four-day journey beginning a walk of seeking the Father’s heart without distraction. These days provide the time needed for searching and listening to what the Father says is true about us. You will leave with a new identity as a son of our Heavenly Father. When we agree with God and walk into our identity we will begin to walk and lead in freedom.

The cost of the event is $400. Space is limited, so sign up today!

events.title: Radiant Kids Summer Camp
events.summary:
Summer Camp is an experience like no other! Students have an opportunity to build friendships and encounter God in a new way. This will be one of the best weeks for your student with strategically planned adventure activities and powerful worship services. Elementary and Middle School camps will both be hosted at Grace Adventures Camp from August 10th - 13th.

Early Bird Cost: $375 until 7/12/26
Cost: $395 after 7/12/26

This cost per camper includes all events, housing, meals, and a t-shirt.

[ WATCH THE PROMO VIDEO ]
[ VISIT THE WEBSITE ]

REGISTER FOR CAMP HERE

ELEMENTARY CAMP
• For campers entering 2nd-5th grades this fall
• Activities: Swimming, blobbing, banana boating, watermat, gaga ball, volleyball, basketball, rec. field, nine-square-in-the-air, chapel games, bb guns, slingshots, gym time, flying squirrel, cargo net, scavenger hunt, campfire and s'mores, crafts, and more.

MIDDLE SCHOOL CAMP
• For campers entering 6th-8th grades this fall
• Activities: Swimming, blobbing, tubing, battle barge, kayaking/canoeing, gaga ball, volleyball, basketball, chapel games, zipline, laser tag, crafts, archery, riffles, rec. field, climbing wall, crud wars, gym time, campfire and s'mores, and more.

FINANCES & DISCOUNTS
The cost of camp is $395 per camper. If you register before July 12th to will receive a $20 discount per camper. A $75 deposit is due at signup to reserve your student's spot. A free waiting list option is also available. Contact your church office if you require financial assistance. For households with more than one student attending, a $50 discount is automatically applied to every camper after the first one.

OPTIONAL TRANSPORTATION [Radiant Jackson Campers Only]
For drop-off and pick-up for your camper, you can choose to do this in person, or for an additional $30, your camper can ride the bus to and from camp. Be sure to select the appropriate transportation add-on for your camper when registering. If you have any questions regarding transportation, please reach out to your home church.
